server.title: Media Server
server.intro: As a personal project, I set up a complete infrastructure on an Ubuntu server, integrating modern technologies to meet various needs while ensuring security, performance, and reliability. This project demonstrates my mastery of essential software engineering tools and my ability to solve complex problems independently.
server.dockerDesc: I deployed and orchestrated several services using Docker, each running in an isolated environment to maximize security and modularity:
dockerList: Portainer to easily supervise and manage all containers
server.securityDesc: A key aspect of this project was the implementation of advanced IT security practices:
securityList: Reverse-proxy with SSL/TLS: configured a reverse-proxy container (Nginx Proxy Manager) to redirect incoming connections while encrypting communications via HTTPS.
Cloudflare: secured the server's domain using Cloudflare's advanced protections, including IP masking and DDoS attack blocking.
Robust firewall (white-list): set up a strict firewall to block unauthorized connections and ensure continuous protection.

VPN network: configured a WireGuard container to establish a virtual private network (VPN), ensuring optimal security for remote server access. This setup isolates sensitive connections and ensures communication confidentiality while allowing secure management of hosted services.
server.autoDesc: I integrated a script to automate Docker container updates, as well as Ubuntu's unattended updates. This approach ensures that each service and the operating system remain up to date without manual intervention, reducing vulnerability risks and minimizing maintenance efforts.

website.title: Website
website.intro: I undertook the design of a React web page developed as part of my studies and professional journey in IT. This project was designed to showcase my technical skills and achievements, while providing a smooth and pleasant user experience.
website.skillsDesc: The portfolio is structured to present my full-stack development skills, notably using technologies such as React, Java, C#, Python, Docker, and many others. Each section of the site is dedicated to a particular aspect of my skills, allowing visitors to quickly understand my expertise.
website.projectsDesc: I have included detailed sections on some of my recent projects, such as setting up a media server and creating a portfolio web page. These projects demonstrate my ability to manage complex projects, use modern technologies, and solve technical problems independently.
website.uxDesc: I paid particular attention to user experience by integrating features such as smooth scrolling with React-Scroll, animated loading icons with React-Loading-Icons, and dynamic text effects with React-Typed. These elements make navigation on the site more intuitive and engaging.
website.securityDesc: For the media server project, I implemented advanced IT security practices, such as using Docker containers, configuring robust firewalls, and integrating VPN networks. These measures ensure the security, performance, and reliability of the infrastructure.
website.designDesc: I used royalty-free SVG illustrations from Undraw to visually enrich the content of my site. These illustrations bring a professional and modern touch to the entire portfolio.
website.conclusion: This online portfolio project reflects my commitment to developing efficient and high-quality software solutions. It demonstrates not only my technical skills, but also my ability to design attractive and functional user interfaces.

gaming.title: Video Game
gaming.intro: My team and I developed a video game as part of a college project to gain skills in game creation. We used Unity as the game engine and programmed all mechanics in C#. To speed up development and focus on implementing features, we integrated 3D models from the Unity Asset Store. The core concept allows players to design their own city through an intuitive 3D object selection and manipulation interface. Once the city is built, players can explore their creation in first-person view, with the ability to perform stunts to enrich their experience.
gaming.goal1Desc: Creation of an interactive environment where players can freely build and explore. Integration of mechanics that enhance immersion, such as smooth camera management and an optimized movement system.
gaming.goal2Desc: Development of a 3D object selection and manipulation system allowing players to place, move, and adjust architectural elements. Implementation of an ergonomic menu, designed with Unity UI, offering smooth navigation and quick handling.
gaming.goal3Desc: Implementation of orthogonal, free, and FPS camera systems ensuring smooth exploration of created cities.
gaming.goal4Desc: Development of an advanced physics system using Unity Physics to allow players to perform stunts and interact with the environment. Integration of specific movement mechanics inspired by the superhero Spiderman (sprint, jump, wallrun, web-swinging).

ai.title: Giant Tic-Tac-Toe AI
ai.intro: As part of a university project, we developed an artificial intelligence capable of playing Giant Tic-Tac-Toe, an advanced version of the famous board game. Unlike classic tic-tac-toe, this version is based on a nested grid: each cell of the main board (3x3) contains a mini tic-tac-toe game (3x3). The goal is to win three aligned mini-games to win the match. The complexity comes from the fact that each move determines the opponent's next play area, requiring advanced strategy and a global vision of the board.
ai.minimax: Minimax algorithm with Alpha-Beta pruning for efficient decision-making in a very large state space.
ai.heuristic: Optimized heuristic evaluation function to prioritize the best moves and speed up decisions.
ai.moves: Generation of valid moves taking into account the constraints of the board.
ai.network: Interaction with a game server via a network interface to test our AI against other agents.
